task_title: Assign personnel to roles based on skills and requirements.
Maintain and update legal volumes in a law library
Call police or fire departments during emergencies or security breaches
Butcher and clean fowl, fish, poultry, and shellfish.
Take beverage orders from patrons or serving staff
Receive patron baggage and attach completed claim checks
Wrap and package merchandise for shipment
Arrange cash and coins in dispensers by denomination.
Answer routine inquiries and refer patrons to professional librarians
Recommend products or services to meet specific customer needs
